ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_params" TEXT /* Parameters for the task */,
  "task_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the task */,
  "verbose_name" TEXT /* Verbose name of the task */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the task */,
  "run_at" TEXT /* Scheduled time for the task */,
  "repeat" INTEGER /* Number of times the task should be repeated */,
  "repeat_until" TEXT /* Time until which the task should be repeated */,
  "queue" INTEGER /* Queue to which the task belongs */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts made to execute the task */,
  "failed_at" TEXT /* Time when the task failed */,
  "last_error" TEXT /* Last error message */,
  "locked_by" INTEGER /* ID of the worker that locked the task */,
  "locked_at" TEXT /* Time when the task was locked */,
  "creator_object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object that created the task */,
  "creator_content_type_id" INTEGER /* Content type ID of the object that created the task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., pending, running, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the task was last updated */,
  "execution_time" INTEGER /* Estimated or actual time taken to execute the task */,
  "retry_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the task has been retried */,
  "next_retry_at" TEXT /* Scheduled time for the next retry */,
  "max_retries" INTEGER /* Maximum number of retries allowed for the task */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department that created the task */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorizing tasks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_locked_by FOREIGN KEY ("locked_by") REFERENCES workers ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_creator_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_object_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_queue FOREIGN KEY ("queue") REFERENCES queues ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workers" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each worker */,
  "worker_name" TEXT /* Name of the worker */,
  "worker_type" TEXT /* Type of the worker (e.g., CPU, GPU) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the worker (e.g., idle, busy, offline) */,
  "last_heartbeat" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last heartbeat from the worker */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of tasks the worker can handle concurrently */,
  "current_load" INTEGER /* Current number of tasks being processed by the worker */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the worker was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the worker was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queues" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each queue */,
  "queue_name" TEXT /* Name of the queue */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department that owns the queue */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the queue (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the queue was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the queue was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_results" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task result */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the task */,
  "result_time" TEXT /* Time when the task was completed */,
  "execution_time" INTEGER /* Estimated or actual time taken to execute the task */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* Detailed result information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_results_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_dependencies" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task dependency */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "dependent_task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dependency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_dependencies_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_dependencies_dependent_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_logs" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task log */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time when the log was created */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log message (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Additional details for the log message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_logs_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, developer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
